scenario_description: The user first says Q4 target is 110%%, then changes it to 120%%.

command:
printf '2025 Annual Work Plan

Q1 Target: Achieve 20%% of annual sales, acquire 15 new clients.

Q2 Target: Achieve 25%% of annual sales, host one industry summit.

Q3 Target: Achieve 30%% of annual sales, finalize 2 strategic partnerships.
' > /home/user/Desktop/work_plan.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add the Q4 target to the plan: Achieve 110%% of annual sales
Set the target higher, change it to 120%%, then save
